nodes.name: MongoDB - Insert Log
nodes.notes: Inserts into whatsappLogs collection per WhatsappLog mongoose schema.

nodes.name: MongoDB – Update template status
nodes.notes: Matches on waTemplateId, sets status + reason. onError continues so we can log failures instead of halting.

nodes.name: MongoDB - Find template
nodes.notes: Checks whether a document with this waTemplateId actually exists before attempting to update it.
